items.title: 人们记忆中的奶奶家厨房
items.description: 旧厨房里的饭香、蒸汽和常见物件，被整理成一张温暖的记忆热力图。
items.prompt: Horizontal editorial data-visualization poster about collective memory: grandmother's kitchen in people's memory without relying on readable text. A warm old Chinese family kitchen seen from above and slightly front-facing: enamel bowls, chipped blue-white tiles, steam from a rice cooker, old wooden cabinet, thermos, plastic stools. Overlay subtle infographic elements made of objects: small tick marks on tiles, translucent memory heat-map glow around stove and dining table, tiny icon-like utensils arranged as bar charts, thread lines connecting common remembered details. Nostalgic but analytical, documentary photography mixed with clean infographic design, soft morning light, muted colors, high detail, no logos, no legible text.

items.title: 小学走廊
items.description: 童年脚步、书包和午后光线在旧校舍走廊里形成密度轨迹。
items.prompt: Horizontal editorial statistical image about collective memory: primary school corridor. A long Chinese elementary school hallway from a child's eye height, green lower wall paint, terrazzo floor, classroom doors, red scarf shadows, sunlight rectangles, bulletin boards with illegible paper shapes. Overlay gentle data visualization: shoe-print density trails, chalk-dust particles forming histograms, translucent timeline bands along the corridor, small icon clusters of backpacks, lunch boxes, jump ropes, pencil cases. Mood: after-lunch silence and echoing footsteps, nostalgic, clean magazine infographic layout, realistic scene plus semi-transparent charts, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 第一次喜欢的人的背影
items.description: 校园黄昏里一个逐渐走远的背影，被记忆概率和心跳线包围。
items.prompt: Horizontal cinematic infographic poster about collective memory: the back view of the first person you liked. A quiet school courtyard at dusk, a teenage figure seen only from behind walking away under plane trees, soft uniform silhouette, no identifiable face. Foreground slightly blurred notebooks and a bicycle. Overlay statistical memory graphics: translucent heart-rate line, fading probability bands around distance, small repeated silhouettes as frequency marks, color-coded bokeh dots showing remembered details like hair, collar, backpack strap, sunlight. Tender, restrained, bittersweet, realistic photography blended with elegant data visualization, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 失恋
items.description: 雨夜房间中的手机、空杯和凌乱床铺，构成一份情绪下坠曲线。
items.prompt: Horizontal visual statistics poster about collective memory: heartbreak. A small apartment bedroom at night after rain, unmade bed, phone face down glowing faintly, two mugs with one untouched, train ticket scraps, open window with wet city lights. Overlay data-like emotional traces: clustered blue dots on the pillow, line graph dipping across the window reflection, calendar squares dissolving into blur, broken conversation bubbles rendered as abstract empty rounded shapes with no text, heat-map around the phone and door. Melancholy but elegant, cinematic realism, muted blue and amber, high detail, magazine infographic composition, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 小卖部门口的夏夜
items.description: 冰柜、硬币、蚊香和荧光灯，把童年夏夜统计成一张街角剖面。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective-memory statistical poster: summer evening at the old neighborhood grocery kiosk. A tiny street-side convenience kiosk in a Chinese residential compound, freezer with popsicles, glass jars, hanging mosquito coils, faded awning, children counting coins, adults chatting under a single fluorescent tube. Overlay infographic details: popsicle wrappers arranged as color bars, coin circles as scatterplot, mosquito paths as dotted curves, heat-map glow around freezer and cashier window, timeline strip of childhood summers. Nostalgic documentary realism plus clean data graphics, warm dusk light, no brand logos, no readable text.

items.title: 冬天教室窗户上的雾气
items.description: 课桌、保温杯和结雾玻璃，把寒冷早晨变成一张温差记忆图。
items.prompt: Horizontal statistical memory image: winter classroom window condensation. An old classroom on a cold morning, wooden desks, metal-framed windows fogged with breath, students' sleeves and thermos cups, chalkboard blurred with no readable writing. Finger-drawn hearts and simple shapes on the condensation, sunlight slicing through dust. Overlay data visualization: condensation droplets forming histograms, desk rows as a grid map, colored thermal contours around radiators and cups, tiny chalk fragments as dot plots. Quiet collective memory, realistic with precise infographic overlays, cool gray and warm sunlight, no legible text.

items.title: 放学后雨水的味道
items.description: 校门口的湿柏油、伞和水洼，被画成雨后气味的扩散图。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective memory infographic: the smell of rain after school. School gate after a sudden summer rain, wet asphalt reflecting trees, puddles, umbrellas closing, children in uniforms stepping around water, a parent holding a bicycle. Overlay smell and memory as statistical visuals: raindrop-size distribution, concentric scent contours rising from hot pavement, colored arcs linking puddles, shoe splashes as scatter points, small icons of umbrella, bicycle, textbook, steamed bun arranged like a legend without readable labels. Fresh, humid, nostalgic realism, clean scientific poster design, no text, no logos.

items.title: 年夜饭开席前
items.description: 空椅、碗筷和电视光组成一张家庭团聚的座位网络。
items.prompt: Horizontal visual statistics poster about collective memory: New Year family table before everyone arrives. A round dining table in an older apartment, empty chairs, bowls and chopsticks already placed, oranges, sunflower seeds, red paper decorations without readable characters, TV glow from the side. Overlay infographic: seating positions as a circular network, dish colors as radial chart, steam trails as thin lines, small household objects counted in neat dot rows, warm memory heat around the table center. Intimate Chinese family nostalgia, realistic interior photography with subtle data visualization, warm tungsten light, no legible text, no logos.

items.title: 离家后的第一间出租屋
items.description: 行李箱、夹灯和廉价窗帘，把初到城市的孤独映射成房间平面图。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective memory data poster: the first rented room after leaving home. A tiny urban rental room with a single bed, suitcase half-open, clip-on desk lamp, cheap curtain, induction cooker on a small table, laundry hanging near window, city lights outside. Overlay statistical graphics: floor-plan grid, object-count dot matrix, loneliness heat-map near the bed, budget bars made of coins and instant noodle cups, route lines from hometown to city shown as abstract arcs without map labels. Honest, quiet, realistic, soft fluorescent and window light, elegant infographic overlays, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 病房外的等待
items.description: 医院走廊的椅子、保温杯和踱步路径，记录焦虑而沉默的等待时间。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective-memory statistics poster: hospital corridor waiting outside a ward. A quiet public hospital corridor, green plastic chairs, thermos flask, payment slips as blurred papers with no readable text, family members waiting, fluorescent lights, nurse station far away. Overlay data visualization: waiting-time bands along the floor, pulse-like line graph, chair occupancy dots, soft heat-map around clasped hands and the ward door, thin arrows showing repeated pacing paths. Human, restrained, documentary realism plus transparent infographic layers, pale green and white palette with warm skin tones, no legible text, no logos.

items.title: 绿皮夜车硬座
items.description: 硬座车厢里的泡面、行李和睡意，被整理成一条疲惫的路线图。
items.prompt: Horizontal data-visualization memory poster: night train hard-seat carriage. An old overnight train carriage in China, blue seats, luggage racks, thermos bottles, instant noodles, sleeping passengers leaning on each other, window reflecting dark countryside and station lights. Overlay statistical graphics: route line as glowing thread across windows, seat occupancy matrix, steam from noodles becoming line charts, ticket stubs as abstract rectangles with no readable text, fatigue heat-map around heads and hands. Nostalgic travel realism, cinematic low light, clean infographic design, no logos, no legible words.

items.title: 爷爷的收音机
items.description: 周日下午的阳光和老收音机，把声音记忆扩散成一圈圈波纹。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective memory statistical poster: grandfather's radio on a Sunday afternoon. A sunlit old living room, woven chair, small wooden radio, lace tablecloth, tea glass, wall calendar blurred without readable text, dust in sunlight, someone napping just out of focus. Overlay data visualization: radio waves as concentric curves, sound-frequency bars made from dust motes, memory attention heat-map around the radio and window, small household objects arranged as dot counts, soft timeline band across the carpet. Warm, slow, realistic, elegant infographic poster, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 老澡堂更衣室
items.description: 瓷砖、拖鞋、脸盆和水汽，组成一份潮湿的公共生活样本。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective memory infographic poster: the neighborhood bathhouse locker room. Old public bathhouse locker room, tiled walls, wooden benches, plastic slippers, enamel basins, foggy mirrors, towels hanging, warm steam, people only as soft anonymous silhouettes. Overlay statistical elements: steam density contours, slipper colors as small bar charts, locker grid as memory matrix, water droplets forming dot plots, warm/cool zones around showers and benches. Tactile, humid, nostalgic, respectful documentary realism with clean semi-transparent data graphics, no nudity, no readable text, no logos.

items.title: 考场里的钟
items.description: 墙上的时钟、橡皮屑和握笔的手，把考试焦虑拉成时间膨胀图。
items.prompt: Horizontal statistical image about collective memory: the exam room clock. A quiet exam classroom, rows of desks, pencils, admission cards blurred with no readable text, a large wall clock, bright noon light, tense hands on paper, faces not identifiable. Overlay data visualization: time dilation rings around the clock, tiny eraser crumbs as scatter plot, heartbeat line across desk edges, answer-sheet circles as abstract pattern with no text, stress heat-map around hands and clock. Clean, intense, realistic, elegant infographic poster, restrained colors, no logos, no legible writing.

items.title: 搬离童年住过的家
items.description: 纸箱、灰尘轮廓和空房间，把告别具象成一张缺席热力图。
items.prompt: Horizontal collective memory data poster: moving out from a childhood home. An old apartment living room full of cardboard boxes, dust outlines where furniture used to be, rolled bamboo mat, family photos turned face-down, doorway to empty bedroom, late afternoon light. Overlay statistical elements: object inventory dots, floor dust as heat-map of absence, moving paths as curved arrows, box sizes as bar chart, faint room layout grid, memory intensity fading from warm to gray. Poignant, realistic, high detail, refined infographic overlays, no readable text, no logos.
